f.garden-guardians-ii.name: Garden Guardians II
f.garden-guardians-ii.description:
"Why join the war effort when it will inevitably lead to destruction of the plants you hold dear?"

"Because refusing to fight will only result in even greater destruction to my children, and that is something I cannot abide."
-Conversations with Agronomo

f.forts-fortitude-i.name: Fort's Fortitude I
f.forts-fortitude-i.effects: Defence of Naitour: 16% chance to proc 250 Magic damage vs Undead raids; +40% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.forts-fortitude-i.description:
"If these creatures think they are the first hoards to attack the Fort, we'll just have to show them how wrong they are."
-Clyburn Softshadow

f.build-a-battalion-i.name: Build-a-Battalion I
f.build-a-battalion-i.description: The best way to ensure your orders are flawlessly carried out is to build the troops you intend to carry them out. Surely nothing could go awry with that plan.... right?

f.frigidara-defenders-ii.name: Frigidara Defenders II
f.frigidara-defenders-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 4-Any
Troops: 2-Any, 4-Elf+Ran, 3-Dwa+Tan, 4-Gno+Sup, 4-Gob+Hea, 3-Orc+Mel
f.frigidara-defenders-ii.effects: +8% Crit Rate vs Frigidara; +200% Formation Special vs Frigidara
f.frigidara-defenders-ii.description:
"Do not underestimate these Defenders. They know what to do, here. Better than some."
-Burz

f.tedupevair-seekers.name: Tedupevair Seekers
f.tedupevair-seekers.effects: Scarce Findings: 4% chance to proc 25,000 Magic damage; +3,000 damage per Tedupevair Slitherer or Tedupevair Winger in the Formation
f.tedupevair-seekers.description: There are a number of different ways to spread out and search for lost things. The Tedupevair suggest that their method is best left for finding things that were intentionally hidden.

f.capricious-conductivity-i.name: Capricious Conductivity I
f.capricious-conductivity-i.effects: Conductive Elegance: 8% chance to proc 40,000 Lightning damage; +7,500 damage per Capricious Carter in the Formation
f.capricious-conductivity-i.description:
"Don't you feel the electrisssity asss it flowsss through you? The condusssersss ssstore the power, and let you utilissse it to enhanssse your ssspeed and ssstrength."
-Dhiva

f.floor-guardians-iv.name: Floor Guardians IV
f.floor-guardians-iv.effects: +25% Formation Special vs Guild raids; +60% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.floor-guardians-iv.description:
"Information can be the most powerful weapon in the world. However, let us show you that power can sometimes be just as powerful."
-Istovin Telaer

f.stone-struggles-i.name: Stone Struggles I
f.stone-struggles-i.effects: Let's Break It Down: 14% chance to proc 500 Physical damage; Prevents damage to Armies from the Stone Gaze Ability
f.stone-struggles-i.description:
"What wrong with being stone? Not for everyone. But not bad."
-Gaudann

f.big-green-treads-i.name: Big Green Treads I
f.big-green-treads-i.effects: Magic Materialization: 10% chance to proc 8,000 Physical damage; +500 damage per Orc Army Unit in the Formation
f.big-green-treads-i.description:
"The least you could do while calling yourself commander is dress appropriately. And, no, I'm not helping you with that."
-Nogugh

f.crew-of-the-vengeance.name: Crew of the Vengeance
f.crew-of-the-vengeance.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Mel, Per, 2-Any
Troops: Mel, Agi, Any, 2-Ran+Per
f.crew-of-the-vengeance.effects: Shudder Sailors' Vengeance: 15% chance to proc 550 Dark damage
f.crew-of-the-vengeance.description: At a casual glance, the crew of this particular ship seems somewhat lackluster, but after closely observing them for a day, you've no doubt that while they may jest merrily and act like fools, they are incredibly proficient, both at sailing and combat.

f.munitioned-archer-i.name: Munitioned Archer I
f.munitioned-archer-i.description: An archer on a hill can accomplish a fair deal, but only so long as their arsenal lasts. An archer with a gopher, however....

f.knot-onslaught-ii.name: Knot Onslaught II
f.knot-onslaught-ii.effects: Viper's Pit: 30% chance to proc 500 Poison damage
f.knot-onslaught-ii.description:
"Your talentsss cccertainly ssseem to be improving, human. I'd sssay I wasss impressssed, but I had no real faith in your ssskillsss to begin with."
-Vishdar Maji

f.flash-of-lightning-ii.name: Flash of Lightning II
f.flash-of-lightning-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Cas, 2-Agi, Cns, 3-Any
Troops: Sup, Agi, 2-HEl, 5-Any, 2-Sup+Agi
f.flash-of-lightning-ii.effects: Derzis' Boom: 12% chance to proc 2,880 Lightning damage
f.flash-of-lightning-ii.description:
"Be fast. Strike harshly. Like the lightning, else struck by it."
-Ghrighora

f.swiftslicers-iii.name: Swiftslicers III
f.swiftslicers-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: 6-Mel, Hea, Sup, 3-Any
Troops: 6-Mel, Hea, Sup, 6-Any
f.swiftslicers-iii.effects: Lively Lutz: 30% chance to proc 8,000 Fire damage vs Winter raids; +85% Formation Special vs Winter raids
f.swiftslicers-iii.description: The first cut may be the deepest, but we must go deeper, and must make it even hotter.

f.frostwardens.name: Frostwardens
f.frostwardens.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Tan, 2-Cas, 2-Int, 2-Any, Gno+Cas+Int
Troops: Mel, 2-Tan, Ran, 2-Cas, Hea, Sup, 2-Any
f.frostwardens.effects: Frostwarden's Bloom: 50% chance to proc 500 Ice damage and reduce incoming damage to the Player by 5%
f.frostwardens.description:
"The brilliant, glistening form of ice is the ultimate tool of protection. We guard its secrets, and use its secrets to guard all we survey."
-Aisi Tushar

f.slithering-sequence-i.name: Slithering Sequence I
f.slithering-sequence-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas
Troops: Mel, 2-Tan, 2-Ran, Cas
f.slithering-sequence-i.effects: Pungi's Charm: 25% chance to proc 240 Psychic damage vs Naga raids; +25% Formation Special vs Naga raids
f.slithering-sequence-i.description: It takes a great deal of planning, practice, and fancy footwork to out-maneuvre a skilled Naga warrior. Fortunately, you've seen enough action to pass your knowledge on to others.... whether they're up to the task of following instruction, however, is a different story entirely.

f.chased-the-storm-ii.name: Chased the Storm II
f.chased-the-storm-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Cas, Hea, Sup, Int, Per, 4-Any, Orc+Mel+Lea, Cns+Ran
Troops: Tan, 2-Sup, 2-Int, Per, 2-Gno, 7-Any
f.chased-the-storm-ii.effects: Greasy Lightning: 12% chance to proc 2,625 Lightning damage and 2,625 Nature damage
f.chased-the-storm-ii.description: Your biggest fear involving this business of stormchasing is what you're supposed to do with it once you've caught it!

f.battle-bretheren-i.name: Battle Bretheren I
f.battle-bretheren-i.effects: Kin-in-Arms: 6% chance to proc 75 Physical damage
f.battle-bretheren-i.description:
"You have my sword,"

"And you have my bow"

"And my axe"

Unfortunately, you were hoping for some assistance, not to be treated like a packhorse!

f.adventurers-spirit-i.name: Adventurer's Spirit I
f.adventurers-spirit-i.description: The spirit of the wandering adventurer is as broad as the horizon before them.

f.morass-ministrations.name: Morass Ministrations
f.morass-ministrations.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Hea, 2-Sup, 2-Int, 3-Any, Mer+Ran, Gob+Hea+Int
Troops: 3-Ran, 2-Cas, 2-Sup, 2-HEl, 3-Mer, 3-Any
f.morass-ministrations.effects: Grime Time: 8% chance to proc 8,000 Acid damage; +16,000 damage vs raids with Venomous
f.morass-ministrations.description:
"Come now, there is nothing wrong with a little dirt and mud from time to time, especially when it helps ward off much scarier things!"
-Aguil Morassma

f.battle-bretheren-ii.name: Battle Bretheren II
f.battle-bretheren-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Hum, Elf, Dwa, Any
Troops: 2-Hum, 2-Elf, 2-Dwa, 2-Any
f.battle-bretheren-ii.effects: Kin-in-more-Arms: 6% chance to proc 225 Physical damage
f.battle-bretheren-ii.description:
"Whether your skin is green, black, pink or tan, whether you are short or tall, and regardless of where your ancestors hail, you are here before me now, seeking to defend the honour of Mihr. I accept you, man and woman alike, and expect you to accept your brothers and sisters as you discharge your duties to the city!"
-Hamond, Lieutenant of the Mihr Citywatch

f.count-combatant-ii.name: Count Combatant II
f.count-combatant-ii.effects: Stoker the Fires: 20% chance to proc 1500 Fire damage vs Undead raids; +70% Formation Special vs Immense raids
f.count-combatant-ii.description:
"Despite all his fineries, demeanour and riches, it is a still a tragedy that this curse fell upon the Lord Kaspar. Our sympathies, alone, cannot alter fact, but they can help to make it more bearable."
-Corovar

f.blindfolded-band-ii.name: Blindfolded Band II
f.blindfolded-band-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Cas, Agi, Per, Lea, Any
Troops: 3-Mel, 3-Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Cas, 4-Hea, 3-Sup, 5-Any
f.blindfolded-band-ii.effects: As A Bat: 4% chance to proc 2600 Magic damage vs Beast raids; +60% Formation Special vs Beast raids; Prevents damage to Armies from the Stone Gaze Ability
f.blindfolded-band-ii.description:
"As clever as you think you're being with that blindfold, if you pester me again about how I passed I'm going to suggest you drop it down about 4 inches on your face."
-Mirtel

f.dead-after-dawn-i.name: Dead After Dawn I
f.dead-after-dawn-i.effects: Can't Stop, Won't Stop: 10% chance to proc 6,000 Dark damage; +1,000 damage per Undead Army Unit in the Formation
f.dead-after-dawn-i.description: You've heard the phrase 'Nothing will keep us down' before, but wish it wasn't being taken quite so literally.

f.fast-and-furious-i.name: Fast and Furious I
f.fast-and-furious-i.description:
"The question is not whether you slice or smash first, but at what pace you do both. If you only do one or the other, sooner-or-later you'll meet something it doesn't work on, and then what're you gonna do?"
-Kurtis

f.mortiday-llorona-ii.name: Mortiday Llorona II
f.mortiday-llorona-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Sup, 3-Any, Dwa+Sup, Und+Ran+Int
Troops: 2-Mel, Ran, 3-Sup, 2-Fae, 2-Und, 3-Any
f.mortiday-llorona-ii.effects: Mournful Soul: 14% chance to proc 4,000 Dark damage; +4,000 damage vs Human raids; +70% Formation Special vs Human raids
f.mortiday-llorona-ii.description: You cannot help but mourn for what actions you have taken that have wronged others, particularly those you have taken in anger.

f.phermis-wisdom-i.name: Phermis' Wisdom I
f.phermis-wisdom-i.effects: Wisdom and Force: 5% chance to proc 3,000 Physical damage
f.phermis-wisdom-i.description: You think you could get behind this Phermis and her teachings. Hunting, war, and the knowledge of how to do both... what's not to like?

f.orisha-evergrowth.name: Orisha Evergrowth
f.orisha-evergrowth.effects: Rebirth of Nature's Guardians: 12% chance to proc 8,000 Nature damage; +2,000 damage per Uugun or Onishaygu Lyowo in the Formation
f.orisha-evergrowth.description: A seething mass of tendrils and vines swirls about your armies as they begin this formation. It doesn't seem to be hindering their movement, but it's certainly unnerving to behold.

f.packraiders-marauding-i.name: Packraider's Marauding I
f.packraiders-marauding-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Str, Orc, Any, Orc+Str
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Per, 2-Orc, Any
f.packraiders-marauding-i.effects: Packraiders' Pillaging: 40% chance to proc 500 Physical damage
f.packraiders-marauding-i.description:
"It pains to admit, but those demons raid better than us. Help us slaughter them, so we can return to being the best."
-Mazoga Packraider

f.quick-peek-i.name: Quick Peek I
f.quick-peek-i.description: Information is vital in any battle, and the quicker you can get it the sooner you can act on it.

f.factions-felicity-iii.name: Faction's Felicity III
f.factions-felicity-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, Per, Lea, 2-Any, *Sp
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Cas, 2-Hea, 2-Sup, 4-Any, 5-*Sp
f.factions-felicity-iii.effects: Fortuitous Fellowship: 16% chance to proc 5,000 Physical damage; +5,000 damage vs Guild raids; +65% Formation Special vs Guild raids
f.factions-felicity-iii.description:
"Once you've rested up, know that you can head out once more, and that we've got your back. All of us."
-Kylli Oakenbrew

f.undeath-undead-i.name: Undeath Undead I
f.undeath-undead-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Per, Lea, Nag, 4-Any
Troops: 2-Ran, 2-Cas, 5-Nag, 5-Any
f.undeath-undead-i.effects: Just Stay Down!: 15% chance to proc 2,000 Holy damage; +4,000 damage vs Undead raids; +60% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.undeath-undead-i.description: The naga in the Nepyres mountains seem to harbour a particular disdain for the undead that flooded their lands. Fortunately, you're happy to provide an outlet for that discontentment.

f.barons-battalion-i.name: Baron's Battalion I
f.barons-battalion-i.effects: Baron of Gold: 8% chance to proc 12,000 Magic damage
f.barons-battalion-i.description:
"If ye've got any brains in there, ye'd listen closely to what Honourable Stone has to say. She may be young, but her pedigree's undeniable. Well, let's be about't then."
-Ramor Metalborn

f.religiousity-i.name: Religiousity I
f.religiousity-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 2-Hum, Dwa, Fae, Orc, 5-Any
Troops: 5-Sup, 3-Per, 3-Lea, 4-Any
f.religiousity-i.effects: Divine Honours: 5% chance to proc 7,500 Holy damage
f.religiousity-i.description: Honouring ones Gods seems to come in a variety of fashions, from the arts to professing devotion to taking up arms in their names.

f.rear-offence-iii.name: Rear Offence III
f.rear-offence-iii.effects: Guard Your Rear: 4% chance to proc 1,000 Magic damage; +1,000 damage per Caster Army Unit in the Formation; 4% chance to proc 1,000 Physical damage; +1,000 damage per Ranged Army Unit in the Formation
f.rear-offence-iii.description:
"As you can see, our lines have been blasting away at the attackers, and the battle is soon to be ours."

"Well, you've certainly done some damage... but our front lines look about as devastated as theirs do...."
-Conversations with Marley

f.medical-corps-ii.name: Medical Corps II
f.medical-corps-ii.description:
"What kind of leader are you, letting those brutes almost reach us while we try to care for those that YOU managed to get injured!"

"But didn't you just say-"

"Don't you be telling me my business, you sheep-brained farmer, lest you want me to start telling you yours!"
-Conversations with Nymeara

f.fisher-fights-ii.name: Fisher Fights II
f.fisher-fights-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Sup, Hum, Mer, Und, Mer+Cas, Hum+Hea
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, 2-Hea, Any
f.fisher-fights-ii.effects: Fisherman's Delight: 4% chance to proc 3,000 Fire damage; +2,000 damage vs Aquatic raids; +60% Formation Special vs Aquatic raids
f.fisher-fights-ii.description:
"We can certainly be counted upon to aid in this occasion, but it isn't clear to me why any deity would want such a harvest wasted in this manner."
-Morcant

f.gladiators-advance.name: Gladiator's Advance
f.gladiators-advance.description: A key strategy in the colosseum is to coordinate those who can defend against blows with those who can dish them out. Once that is mastered, it is just a matter of taking ground, leaving your opponents nowhere to run.

f.fisher-fights-iv.name: Fisher Fights IV
f.fisher-fights-iv.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Sup, Hum, Mer, Und, 3-Any, Mer+Cas, Hum+Hea
Troops: 4-Mel, 4-Tan, 4-Hea, 6-Any
f.fisher-fights-iv.effects: Flighty Fishfood: 4% chance to proc 10,000 Fire damage; +10,000 damage vs Aquatic raids; +90% Formation Special vs Aquatic raids
f.fisher-fights-iv.description:
"We seek your blessings once more, oh generous Vozotl, and offer up these unworthy tithings from our unworthy hands."
-Sollemnia Verus

f.battle-bretheren-iii.name: Battle Bretheren III
f.battle-bretheren-iii.effects: Kin-in-so-many-Arms: 6% chance to proc 750 Physical damage
f.battle-bretheren-iii.description: When undertaking an epic journey, having a band of companions you trust with your life is vital. Now you just need to ensure they don't start trying to take eachothers' lives....

f.mortiday-llorona-i.name: Mortiday Llorona I
f.mortiday-llorona-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Cas, Sup, Any, Dwa+Sup, Und+Ran+Int
Troops: Mel, 2-Sup, 2-Und, Any
f.mortiday-llorona-i.effects: Wrathful Revenge: 14% chance to proc 2,000 Dark damage; +2,000 damage vs Human raids; +45% Formation Special vs Human raids
f.mortiday-llorona-i.description: A sense of overwhelming anger seems to settle in you as you direct your armies in this formation. Somehow, you know you've been wronged, and you're ready to lash out.

f.viscous-preparations-i.name: Viscous Preparations I
f.viscous-preparations-i.unitComposition:
Commanders:Ran, Cas, Hea, Int, Per, Lea, 5-Any, Hum+Sup+Lea, Sup+Str
Troops: Ran, Cas, Hea, 5-Sup, 2-Int, Per, Hum, HEl, 4-Any
f.viscous-preparations-i.effects: Scrupulous Slime: 13% chance to proc 8,000 Acid damage and reduce damage to Armies by 20%; +5,000 damage per Viscous Herbalist or Viscous Alchemist in the Formation
f.viscous-preparations-i.description: Aelric comes across as scatterbrained, but when he starts preparations for a new batch of experiments he can be incredibly meticulous and careful in his efforts.

f.citywatch-ii.name: Citywatch II
f.citywatch-ii.effects: Defence of Mihr: 10% chance to proc 160 Physical damage
f.citywatch-ii.description:
"You two, get the lanterns alight and sound the alarms. You four, rouse the barracks and ready the men for battle. You three, come with me."

"Where are we going, sir?"

"We're going to buy the others as much time as we're able. Prepare for combat."
-Hamond, on the eve of the Invasion of Mihr

f.battle-bretheren-iv.name: Battle Bretheren IV
f.battle-bretheren-iv.effects: Kin-in-how-many-Arms?!: 6% chance to proc 1,500 Physical damage
f.battle-bretheren-iv.description: Apparently some wise soul said that more makes for merriment… They apparently neglected to described the extra messiness it also creates.

f.luna-cruzados-ii.name: Luna Cruzados II
f.luna-cruzados-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Sup, Per, Lea, 2-Any, Dwa+Tan, *Sp
Troops: 3-Cas, 3-Sup, 3-Con, 3-Int, Dwa, Gno, 3-Any
f.luna-cruzados-ii.effects: Campaigner of the Moon: 4% chance to proc 30,000 Holy damage and protect the Player from Brimstone Aura - Fire; +20,000 damage vs Demon Raids; +60% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.luna-cruzados-ii.description: The allure of purging the lands of hellspawn is certainly appealing, and it isn't difficult to rally people under this banner.

f.count-combatant-iii.name: Count Combatant III
f.count-combatant-iii.effects: Stoke the Bramfire: 20% chance to proc 4500 Fire damage vs Undead raids; +80% Formation Special vs Immense raids
f.count-combatant-iii.description:
"Once we breach his forces, you let me have the first crack at Lord Kaspar. This man belongs to me, and I want him!"
-Corovar

f.awasinin-wiikwan-i.name: Awasinin Wiikwan I
f.awasinin-wiikwan-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Per, Lea, Any, Und+Ran, *Sp
Troops: 2-Ran, 2-Hea, 4-Per
f.awasinin-wiikwan-i.effects: Path of Grief: 4% chance to proc 6,000 Magic damage and reduce damage to Armies by 25%; +14,000 damage vs Undead Raids; +50% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.awasinin-wiikwan-i.description:
"If we fail to protect the defenceless, we have only ourselves to blame."
-Kitchi Wayguard

f.team-encampment-ii.name: Team Encampment II
f.team-encampment-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 3-Any
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, 4-Ran, 3-Cas, 2-Sup, 5-Any
f.team-encampment-ii.effects: Team Confiture: 2% chance to proc 135,000 Physical damage; +30% Formation Special vs Guild raids
f.team-encampment-ii.description:
"This is certainly an optimal means to protect both yourself and your armies. For a being of flesh, you have certainly surprised me."
-Adroit

f.medical-corps-i.name: Medical Corps I
f.medical-corps-i.description:
"What makes you think we need someone to 'Mind us' while we're tending to the wounded? Have you any actual brains between those ears of yours, or is it stuffed to-the-brim with corn?"
-Nymeara

f.overwhelming-desire-ii.name: Overwhelming Desire II
f.overwhelming-desire-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Str, Con, Agi, Int, Per, Lea, 4-Any
Troops: 2-Sup, 2-Agi, 5-Fae, 6-Any
f.overwhelming-desire-ii.effects: Wants Becoming Needs: 18% chance to proc 4,000 Magic damage; +500 damage per Northern Brownie in the Formation
f.overwhelming-desire-ii.description: When the urge overcomes you, sometimes fighting back just isn't worth the effort.

f.aureus-aureum-i.name: Aureus' Aureum I
f.aureus-aureum-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, 2-Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Cas, 2-Sup, Con, 2-Lea, Dwa, Any, *Sp
Troops: 4-Tan, 3-Sup, 4-Con, 2-Agi, 2-Int, 3-Lea, 3-Any
f.aureus-aureum-i.effects: Golden Goodness: 8% chance to proc 12,000 Magic damage
f.aureus-aureum-i.description:
"Do not be confused, my father is not planning on bankrolling your... whatever this is. Revolution? Journey? I can cover my expenses, but you'll have to do your part, as well."
-Honourable Audia Stone

f.harmonious-band-ii.name: Harmonious Band II
f.harmonious-band-ii.description: Sometimes you need more than a bow, a wand, a sword and a shield to get the job done. Sometimes you need two of each of them.

f.swiftslicers-ii.name: Swiftslicers II
f.swiftslicers-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: 5-Mel, Hea, Sup, 2-Any
Troops: 6-Mel, Hea, Sup, 3-Any
f.swiftslicers-ii.effects: Cutting Crossovers: 30% chance to proc 4,000 Fire damage vs Winter raids; +75% Formation Special vs Winter raids
f.swiftslicers-ii.description: Go faster. Get hotter. Cut deeper. Win better.

f.phermis-wisdom-ii.name: Phermis' Wisdom II
f.phermis-wisdom-ii.effects: Wisdom in Force: 5% chance to proc 3,600 Physical damage
f.phermis-wisdom-ii.description:
"The question is not whether you deserve the wisdom to know how to hunt and kill, but whether you earn the wisdom to know when to do either."
-Meropi Demide

f.reodai-reflection.name: Reodai Reflection
f.reodai-reflection.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, 2-Sup, Str, Con, 2-Agi, 2-Int, Per, 2-Any, Nag+Lea, Gno+Cas+Per
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, Ran, Cas, 3-Hea, 2-Per, 2-Lea, 2-Nag, 3-Any
f.reodai-reflection.effects: Inner Peacing: 9% chance to proc 15,000 Magic damage; +1,500 damage per Reodai Adherent, Reodai Acolyte and Reodai Apostle in the Formation
f.reodai-reflection.description:
"Through acssseptanssse, you can find peassse. Once you have found peassse, ensssure you deliver it upon othersss."
-Lokakshi Coilbreaker

f.pest-repellent-i.name: Pest Repellent I
f.pest-repellent-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Con, Int, 2-Any, Cas+Con
Troops: 6-Ran, 4-Lea, 2-Cns, 3-Any
f.pest-repellent-i.effects: Living Bugs Killed: 25% chance to proc 600 Acid damage vs Insect raids; +25 damage per Stone Spinner in the Formation; +70% Formation Special vs Insect raids
f.pest-repellent-i.description:
"While it is typically better to observe natural phenomenon from an unbiased perspective, there are some critters that are better off checking in, but never out."
-Ailmar Perjeon

f.swiftslicers-i.name: Swiftslicers I
f.swiftslicers-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: 4-Mel, Hea, Sup
Troops: 4-Mel, Hea, Sup, Any
f.swiftslicers-i.effects: Speedy Samalog: 30% chance to proc 3,000 Fire damage vs Winter raids; +50% Formation Special vs Winter raids
f.swiftslicers-i.description: The essence of speed creates warmth. Warmth is life. Best to share that premise during these chilly times.

f.fachin-fallback-iii.name: Fachin Fallback III
f.fachin-fallback-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Sup, Agi, Con, Int, Per, Fae, 5-Any, Hum+Tan+Agi
Troops: 3-Mel, 3-Hea, Sup, Per, 2-Fae, 6-Any
f.fachin-fallback-iii.effects: Fey Foregoer: 16% chance to proc 6,000 Physical damage; +4,000 damage vs Fae raids
f.fachin-fallback-iii.description: You’ve come to expect the unexpected by now, but what you never could have predicted was how delicious these apples taste!

f.musclebound-i.name: Musclebound I
f.musclebound-i.effects: Tricep Tryhards: 8% chance to proc 300 Physical damage
f.musclebound-i.description:
"Many will tell you that it takes a keen eye, vast experience or charismatic methods to lead a force into battle, but sometimes it is a lot simpler than that. The presence of so much eye-candy is just a collateral bonus..."
-Tanya Amethyst

f.brawns-and-brains-i.name: Brawns and Brains I
f.brawns-and-brains-i.description:
"So, I will stay in the back, here. You- you can go up front, yes?"

"Of course not. The front are for the bulky, meaty folk to keep the back lines safe.... Hey...."
-Conversation with Nico Orbesco

f.fachin-fallback-ii.name: Fachin Fallback II
f.fachin-fallback-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Sup, Agi, Con, Int, Per, Fae, 3-Any, Hum+Tan+Agi
Troops: 3-Mel, 3-Hea, Sup, Per, 2-Fae, 3-Any
f.fachin-fallback-ii.effects: Fey Foreswearer: 16% chance to proc 4,500 Physical damage; +2,500 damage vs Fae raids
f.fachin-fallback-ii.description:
"Don't let this brute turn you away from recognizing the beauties and wonders of the world you've yet to see."
-Bantiloche

f.defensive-stance-ii.name: Defensive Stance II
f.defensive-stance-ii.description:
"Why would you have your allies behave so cowardly? Why not strike out and slay the foe sooner?"

"Are you offering to be on the front lines with them, Alanis?"

"... On second thought, perhaps you are beginning to learn wisdom."

f.gravewatcher-i.name: Gravewatcher I
f.gravewatcher-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Ran, Cas, Sup, Any
Troops: 2-Mel, Cas, 5-Sup, Any
f.gravewatcher-i.effects: Undead Undersight: 15% chance to proc 400 Dark damage vs Undead raids; +50% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.gravewatcher-i.description:
"The lowest of the Gravanguard order are still well paid, though may face disproportionate risk associated with that. If you pay a man enough, he'll walk barefoot into the Hells."
-Sar Tephania

f.rise-of-the-medzeh-i.name: Rise of the Medzeh I
f.rise-of-the-medzeh-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Cas, Any, HEl+Lea, Und+Cas+Int
Troops: 2-Und, 2-Gob, 2-Any
f.rise-of-the-medzeh-i.effects: Medzeh's Watch: 12% chance to proc 2,000 Holy damage; +2,000 damage vs Demon raids; +45% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.rise-of-the-medzeh-i.description:
"Watching for the return of the Suneater is the Medzeh's reason for being. We take this duty seriously. If you knew what it was capable of, you would, too."
-Apui

f.fisher-fights-i.name: Fisher Fights I
f.fisher-fights-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Mer+Cas, Hum+Hea
Troops: Mel, Tan, Hea
f.fisher-fights-i.effects: Fisher's Friend: 4% chance to proc 3,750 Fire damage vs Aquatic raids
f.fisher-fights-i.description:
"We offer up thanks to Vozotl for the bounty the river offers, and to our friends in the depths for assisting with the festivities."

-Sollemnia Verus

f.wintry-escapades-i.name: Wintry Escapades I
f.wintry-escapades-i.effects: Shivery Sabbatical: 10% chance to proc 8,000 Fire damage; +8,000 damage vs Winter raids; +80% Formation Special vs Winter raids
f.wintry-escapades-i.description: Despite your desire to bundle up from the cold, it seems some actually enjoy spending time in frozen, snow-covered environments,

f.divine-foresight-ii.name: Divine Foresight II
f.divine-foresight-ii.description:
"I do not know if that pious host agrees on a singular sect, or belief... But it would take but one adherent to Amera to ensure its wrathful potential is beyond our wildest dreams."
-Avri Stidig

f.waveblesseds-voyage-i.name: Waveblessed's Voyage I
f.waveblesseds-voyage-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, 2-Hea, 3-Sup, Int, Lea, 2-Any, Mer+Cas+Lea
Troops: 3-Mel, 4-Tan, 5-Str, 2-Con, 4-Agi, 2-Any, Fae+Hea+Int
f.waveblesseds-voyage-i.effects: Eptiades' Blessing: 20% chance to proc 6,000 Holy damage; 35% chance to proc 4,000 Nature damage; +5,000 damage per Waveblessed Shiphand in the Formation
f.waveblesseds-voyage-i.description:
"This calling is not for everyone, but the blessings of Eptiades are intended for all who need them. We shall deliver those blessings at His behest, and in turn He will send us favourable winds to travel His waves."
-Azalea Waveblessed

f.ambush-i.name: Ambush I
f.ambush-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Ran, Cas, Per, Lea
Troops: Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Str, 4-Hum, 4-Any
f.ambush-i.effects: Guerrilla Tactics: 40% chance to proc 200 Dark damage
f.ambush-i.description: Approaching from the front and facing down a foe is all well and good, but it presents issues when faced with a superior force. Hit-and-run tactics, while arguably less honourable, may well be the difference between victory and defeat.

f.floor-guardians-iii.name: Floor Guardians III
f.floor-guardians-iii.effects: +25% Formation Special vs Guild raids; +40% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.floor-guardians-iii.description:
"Ssso long asss you keep that fool, Nereusss away from me, I will refrain from further commentsss about your prolific failure in your training ssschedule..."
-Vranda

f.scolfields-entourage-i.name: Scolfield's Entourage I
f.scolfields-entourage-i.effects: Fowl Play: 12% chance to proc 450 Magic damage
f.scolfields-entourage-i.description:
"Well, don't just stand there like a slack-jawed layabout. If you're looking to keep my sponsorship, you're going to have to work for it.... or, at least be useful in other ways..."
-Josian Scolfield

f.glorymuths-grin-iii.name: Glorymuth's Grin III
f.glorymuths-grin-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, 3-Per, Lea, Cns, 5-Any, HEl+Mel+Per
Troops: 3-Ran, 3-Hea, 3-Agi, 3-Int, 5-Any
f.glorymuths-grin-iii.effects: Sadistic Smiles: 20% chance to proc 5625 Dark damage
f.glorymuths-grin-iii.description: Well, if you didn't have something worth smiling about before, the brutal reminder that you're still alive today, in spite of everything trying to deprive you of that, would certainly count.

f.nepyres-navigators-i.name: Nepyres Navigators I
f.nepyres-navigators-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, Con, Int, Per, 2-Und, 2-Nag, Any
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Ran, 2-Cas, 4-Und, 4-Nag, Any
f.nepyres-navigators-i.effects: Terrifying Trek: 8% chance to proc 3,000 Dark damage; 4% chance to proc 5,000 Poison damage
f.nepyres-navigators-i.description:
"Prepare for a difficult journey. Thessse mountainsss are unforgiving. And not all of usss can sssurvive a fall jussst to make our way back to the party."
-Dana La'al

f.munitioned-archer-ii.name: Munitioned Archer II
f.munitioned-archer-ii.description: After watching the Elven Marksmen rain down devastation with remarkable accuracy, you've held the utmost respect for those who fire from a distance. So much so, in fact, that you've decided to pack them together and provide them ample support to continue their barrage uninterrupted. The result is quite the spectacle... a deadly, blood-soaked spectacle.

f.knot-onslaught-i.name: Knot Onslaught I
f.knot-onslaught-i.effects: Viper's Den: 30% chance to proc 200 Poison damage
f.knot-onslaught-i.description:
"It will take sssome practiccce to convinccce thessse Naga to follow you. However, I feel we will make valuable alliesss."
-Seksehsa

f.piercing-strike-i.name: Piercing Strike I
f.piercing-strike-i.description: The swiftest route is the most direct, and that same principle can be applied to a blade.

f.fey-fighters-i.name: Fey Fighters I
f.fey-fighters-i.effects: Two by Two: 30% chance to proc 2000 Physical damage vs Fae raids; +60% Formation Special vs Fae raids
f.fey-fighters-i.description:
"All night long, I dreamed of the day when it was to come and I'd be taken away."
-Dwarf Fae Thrall

f.wise-leadership-ii.name: Wise Leadership II
f.wise-leadership-ii.description:
"Maybe we should let our braves-"

"Wisest."

"Right, wisest commanders take the lead on this one. We can send them to the fron-"

"Back."

".... Back lines to see what can be done."

"I think that is very sound guidance, and we shall do just that."
-Conversations with Glaciver Frost

f.harmonious-band-i.name: Harmonious Band I
f.harmonious-band-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas
Troops: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas
f.harmonious-band-i.description: A straightforward Formation that anyone can figure out.

f.count-combatant-i.name: Count Combatant I
f.count-combatant-i.effects: Stoke the Fires: 20% chance to proc 500 Fire damage vs Undead raids; +60% Formation Special vs Immense raids
f.count-combatant-i.description:
"It is important to ensure haste while fighting these beings, for the dead travel fast"
-Corovar

f.wares-of-hatuumins-eye.name: Wares of Hatuumin's Eye
f.wares-of-hatuumins-eye.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Sup, 3-Con, Int 4-Any, Orc+Mel+Str, Cns+Tan+Con
Troops: 4-Tan, 4-Cas, 2-Agi, 2-Lea, Hum, 2-Orc, Any
f.wares-of-hatuumins-eye.effects: Arid Articles: 12% chance to proc 12,500 Psychic damage; +2,000 damage per Hatuumin Psionic in the Formation; 4% chance to proc 10,000 Psychic damage; +5,000 damage per Hatuumin Psionic in the Formation
f.wares-of-hatuumins-eye.description:
"Thank you, adventurer. We will be sure to come again."
-Rankats

f.musclebound-ii.name: Musclebound II
f.musclebound-ii.effects: Bicep Blasters: 8% chance to proc 900 Physical damage
f.musclebound-ii.description:
"There are times when you'll have to rely upon your mages to blast fireballs, or your rogues to sneak behind enemy lines. You mustn't neglect those times when strong, surly individuals need to do their part on the front lines. Oh, and if that fellow tries to tell you I smacked him, he's lying."
-Tanya Amethyst

f.door-crashers-i.name: Door Crashers I
f.door-crashers-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Cas, Sup, 3-Any, Gob+Per
Troops: 3-Con, 2-Int, 3-Per, 2-Any
f.door-crashers-i.effects: Bringing Down the House: 4% chance to proc 8,000 Acid damage and bypass a Sentinel Raid's damage reduction Ability; +75% Formation Special vs raids with Sentinel
f.door-crashers-i.description: Every obstacle is just an opportunity to figure out how to get past it.

f.easy-being-green-i.name: Easy Being Green I
f.easy-being-green-i.description:
"Everyone is all 'Fagli, carry this', and 'Fagli, you dropped some of the maggots'! If they think my job is that easy, they can cook their own food!"

Waitaminute.... Maggots?

f.killer-kindness-iii.name: Killer Kindness III
f.killer-kindness-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Ran, Cas, Str, Int, 2-Lea, Orc, 2-Any
Troops: 3-Mel, 3-Cas, 6-Perc, 2-Any
f.killer-kindness-iii.effects: Cruelest but Usual: 5% chance to proc 3,000 Holy damage vs Demon raids; +75% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.killer-kindness-iii.description: Apparently Glasha does not appreciate being questioned regarding her tenets of kindness and how they can be used to stop rampaging demons. What worries you more is how Alanis took off after Glasha following her departure, and the ensuing conversations those two are undoubtedly having...

f.band-of-two-sons.name: Band of Two-Sons
f.band-of-two-sons.description: Depending on the region, Half-Elves will either be accepted as much as any humanoid creature, or shunned as being inferior to either of its parent races. These warriors from the eastern shores have long suffered revilement from their neighbours, and banded together to form one of the most successful mercenary bands in living memory.

f.repentant-dusk.name: Repentant Dusk
f.repentant-dusk.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 2-Str, 2-Con, 2-Per, 2-Lea, 4-Any, *Sp
Troops: 3-Mel, 3-Ran, 2-Cas, 2-Sup, 2-Str, 2-Int, 3-Dwa, 3-Orc, 3-Any
f.repentant-dusk.effects: Order of the Repentant Dusk: 30% chance to proc 5,000 Ice damage; 10% chance to proc 16,000 Ice damage; +4,000 damage per Repentant Dusk Blade or Repentant Dusk Cover in the Formation
f.repentant-dusk.description: While it isn't uncommon to hear tell of the Heroic Dusk when discussing the Order of the Repentant Dusk, the latter has a vast number of feats solely attributed to itself that distinguishes it from many mediocre groups on the continent. Known primarily for protecting the weak and staving off evil creatures, the Repentant Dusk followers will share their beliefs with those they serve, but take cautions not to impose their will at the same time.

f.defensive-stance-iii.name: Defensive Stance III
f.defensive-stance-iii.description: Practice defeating the many tendrils of the Watchers has developed your troops into well-groomed soldiers. Defending against dozens of simultaneous tentacles is surely more straightforward than against a handful of two-armed foes!

f.flight-of-the-faeries-ii.name: Flight of the Faeries II
f.flight-of-the-faeries-ii.effects: Petrified Pixies: 30% chance to proc 5,000 Magic damage; +2,000 damage per Fae Army Unit in the Formation
f.flight-of-the-faeries-ii.description: After seeing some of what these poor creatures were subjected to, you can appreciate their desire to depart immediately!

f.fey-fighters-ii.name: Fey Fighters II
f.fey-fighters-ii.effects: Medicine by Twilight: 30% chance to proc 8000 Physical damage vs Fae raids; +100% Formation Special vs Fae raids
f.fey-fighters-ii.description:
"Every day, waiting for the sky to fall... A big crash on a world that was so small..."
-Gnome Fae Thrall

f.awasinin-wiikwan-iii.name: Awasinin Wiikwan III
f.awasinin-wiikwan-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Hea, Per, Lea, 5-Any, Und+Ran, *Sp
Troops: 2-Ran, 2-Hea, 8-Per, 4-Any
f.awasinin-wiikwan-iii.effects: Path of Forgiveness: 4% chance to proc 14,000 Magic damage and reduce damage to Armies by 50%; +30,000 damage vs Undead Raids; +70% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.awasinin-wiikwan-iii.description:
"When all else has failed, grieve for what is lost. Then resolve to prevent any further needless loss."
-Kitchi Wayguard

f.friskfingers-findings-i.name: Friskfingers Findings I
f.friskfingers-findings-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, Agi, Int, Per, 3-Any, Gno+Mel+Agi, Hum+Per
Troops: 3-Cas, 2-Sup, 4-Agi, 4-Per, 2-Hum, 3-Gno, 2-Any
f.friskfingers-findings-i.effects: Finders Keepers: 16% chance to proc 6,250 Dark damage; 4% chance to proc 45,000 Physical damage; +10,000 damage per Friskfingers Stickyfingers or Friskfingers Lookout in the Formation
f.friskfingers-findings-i.description:
"It's not about being nimble, nor even particularly quick, but rather performing noble deeds without seeking notice. See, we have that in common, you and us!"
-Alula Friskfingers

f.cumberworld-company-i.name: Cumberworld Company I
f.cumberworld-company-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Str, Con, Agi, 2-Int, Per, 2-Lea
Troops: 4-Str, 2-Con, 4-Agi, 3-Int, 4-Perc, 3-Lea
f.cumberworld-company-i.effects: Foolish Ideologue: 15% chance to proc 300 Psychic damage; +50% Formation Special vs Human raids
f.cumberworld-company-i.description:
"Come, join the merriment and partake in your heart's desires! Your new Verasect commands it!"
-Bonaguido

f.siegebreaker-i.name: Siegebreaker I
f.siegebreaker-i.effects: War-Machine: 20% chance to proc 400 Physical damage vs Immense, Epic or Gigantic raids
f.siegebreaker-i.description:
"The key to attacking a well-defended fortification is to cut their supply lines and starve them out."

"So, would that also work against gigantic monstrosities?"

"Well, unless you have any other ideas, that's the best I've got."
-Hamond, Lieutenant of the Mihr Citywatch

f.burial-bandits.name: Burial Bandits
f.burial-bandits.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, 2-Cas, Agi, Int, 2-Per, 2-Any, Hum+Tan+Con, Und+Tan+Int
Troops: 3-Str, 3-Con, 3-Int, 3-Per, 4-Any
f.burial-bandits.effects: Taking my Leavings: 5% chance to proc 15,000 Dark damage; +10,000 damage vs Human raids; +40% Formation Special vs Human raids
f.burial-bandits.description:
"Well, it's not like the dead needs it anymore. And if they did, they oughta defended it better."
-Maansik Khudon

f.stone-titanslayers.name: Stone Titanslayers
f.stone-titanslayers.effects: Primitive but Powerful: 50% chance to proc 1,500 Holy damage and reduce incoming damage to the Player from Legendary raids by 10%; +2,500 damage vs Legendary raids; 5% chance to proc 8,000 Holy damage; +1,500 damage per Titanslayer Tosser or Titanslayer Staffer in the Formation; +65% Formation Special vs Legendary raids
f.stone-titanslayers.description: Despite her wild mannerisms, Krozana is certainly far from unpredictable. Her methods, despite being dated, appear to be extremely effective in their intended tactics. You'd be wise to take a page from her book, at least where certain offensive specifics are considered.

f.rangers-advance-ii.name: Ranger's Advance II
f.rangers-advance-ii.description:
"Despite what inexperienced observers may think, rangers aren't intended to be the swiftest, nor the most lethal of units in an army. A ranger needs to be simultaneously invisible, while able to convey their position to the rest of the band, for it is in gathering information that their skills truly shine. If an enemy knows they are being watched, the information gathered is worthless, or, worse, the ranger will not live to relay it."
-Yathane Shahara

f.quick-peek-ii.name: Quick Peek II
f.quick-peek-ii.effects: Unseen Distraction: 20% chance to proc 220 Physical damage
f.quick-peek-ii.description: As simple an idea as 'gather information' may sound, it takes a specific set of skills to be able to obtain reliable information in short order.

f.piercing-strike-ii.name: Piercing Strike II
f.piercing-strike-ii.description: Just because the first strike failed to end the battle doesn't mean you should give up. Sometimes it just takes a second... or third... or thirteenth...

f.factions-felicity-ii.name: Faction's Felicity II
f.factions-felicity-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Hea, Per, Lea, 2-Any, *Sp
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 4-Any, 4-*Sp
f.factions-felicity-ii.effects: Familiar and Favourable: 8% chance to proc 2,500 Physical damage; +2,500 damage vs Guild raids; +50% Formation Special vs Guild raids
f.factions-felicity-ii.description:
"When the road you've traveled has been rough, know that you can always find solace in both the company of comrades, and in a bottom of a tall mug."
-Kylli Oakenbrew

f.team-encampment-iii.name: Team Encampment III
f.team-encampment-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Cas, Hea, Sup, 4-Any
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, 3-Ran, 4-Cas, 3-Hea, 2-Sup, 10-Any
f.team-encampment-iii.effects: Team Assemblage: 2% chance to proc 470,000 Physical damage; +60% Formation Special vs Guild raids
f.team-encampment-iii.description:
"It is not cowardice to fall back when fortune does not favour you. Strike when the opportunity presents, and never before."
-Istovin Telaer

f.easy-being-green-ii.name: Easy Being Green II
f.easy-being-green-ii.description:
"Don't botherbotherbother us with silly commandcommandscommands. Just pointpointpoint us at what needs killingkillingkilling!"
-Rilx

f.floor-guardians-ii.name: Floor Guardians II
f.floor-guardians-ii.effects: +20% Formation Special vs Guild raids; +25% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.floor-guardians-ii.description:
"Oh, just you wait... If I can convince stuffy Geo and Slygse to join, then this show will be divinely fabulous!"
-Nereus

f.luna-cruzados-i.name: Luna Cruzados I
f.luna-cruzados-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Lea, Any, Dwa+Tan, *Sp
Troops: 2-Cas, 2-Sup, Any
f.luna-cruzados-i.effects: Shroud of the Moon: 4% chance to proc 15,000 Holy damage; +10,000 damage vs Demon Raids; +40% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.luna-cruzados-i.description: Every crusade starts small. If its intentions are pure and its draw is sound, it will grow as followers flock to it.

f.troop-tactics-v.name: Troop Tactics V
f.troop-tactics-v.description:
"If you have time to flutter about with your meagre armiesss, you are sssertainly not too busssy to get back to your training!"
-Vranda

f.fisher-fights-iii.name: Fisher Fights III
f.fisher-fights-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Sup, Hum, Mer, Und, Any, Mer+Cas, Hum+Hea
Troops: 4-Mel, 4-Tan, 4-Hea, 2-Any
f.fisher-fights-iii.effects: Fishing for Fights: 4% chance to proc 5,000 Fire damage; +5,000 damage vs Aquatic raids; +75% Formation Special vs Aquatic raids
f.fisher-fights-iii.description:
"Oh great Vozotl, we thank you for your blessings this past year, and pray you take pleasure in this feast we make for you. Comfort us in your firey bosom, and deliver righteous fury to our - and thy - enemies."
-Sollemnia Verus

f.sailors-and-sirens-i.name: Sailors and Sirens I
f.sailors-and-sirens-i.effects: Hard and Easy: 10% chance to proc 280 Physical damage
f.sailors-and-sirens-i.description:
"You shouldn't listen to landlover tales of pirates hunting merfolk; we are far more like to pair up and take the world for ourselves than frivolously squabble."
-Corrissa Swiftfin

f.garden-guardians-i.name: Garden Guardians I
f.garden-guardians-i.description:
"It behooves us to protect the land just as much as we seek to protect our friends and families, for if either falls what are we truly left with?"
-Agronomo

f.overwhelming-desire-i.name: Overwhelming Desire I
f.overwhelming-desire-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Str, Con, Agi, Int, Per, Lea, 2-Any
Troops: 2-Sup, 2-Agi, 5-Fae, 2-Any
f.overwhelming-desire-i.effects: Wants Over Needs: 18% chance to proc 2,500 Magic damage; +300 damage per Northern Brownie in the Formation
f.overwhelming-desire-i.description: Recognizing that what you want is not always what you need is important, but sometimes you've just got to give in and go with it.

f.basic-training.name: Basic Training
f.basic-training.description: A straightforward Formation that anyone can figure out.

f.awasinin-wiikwan-ii.name: Awasinin Wiikwan II
f.awasinin-wiikwan-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Hea, Per, Lea, 4-Any, Und+Ran, *Sp
Troops: 2-Ran, 2-Hea, 8-Per, 2-Any
f.awasinin-wiikwan-ii.effects: Path of Acceptance: 4% chance to proc 10,000 Magic damage and reduce damage to Armies by 40%; +20,000 damage vs Undead Raids; +65% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.awasinin-wiikwan-ii.description:
"Protecting means not only from those who seek to harm our bodies, but also from those within who seek to harm our spirits."
-Kitchi Wayguard

f.kerstavond-generosity.name: Kerstavond Generosity
f.kerstavond-generosity.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, 2-Sup, Per, Lea, 4-Any, HEl+Sup+Con
Troops: 4-Sup, 2-Con, Lea, 3-Dwa, 2-Gno, 4-Any
f.kerstavond-generosity.effects: The Giving Gift: 12% chance to proc 18,000 Magic damage; +5,000 damage vs Winter raids; +40% Formation Special vs Winter raids
f.kerstavond-generosity.description:
"But of course it's better to give than to receive! Mind you... if you are particularly good at giving, this year, you may receive some appreciation from my department."
-Niek Mira

f.krugers-superiority-i.name: Kruger's Superiority I
f.krugers-superiority-i.description:
"Well, it stands to reason, my dear Dunnink, that when you man a brigade with the superior race, you'll see superior results!"

"... While that statement may be true, I really don't think the premise is acc-"

"Ah, so you agree with me! Wunderbar! Let's set about it, then!"
-Kruger

f.offensive-stance-iii.name: Offensive Stance III
f.offensive-stance-iii.effects: Outlandish Offence: 10% chance to proc 4,000 Physical damage
f.offensive-stance-iii.description: When in doubt, hit harder. If that doesn't work, refer to step one.

f.snowy-drake-slayers-i.name: Snowy Drake Slayers I
f.snowy-drake-slayers-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Per, Any, Elf+Cas, Cns+Tan, Orc+Mel
Troops: Mel, Tan, Ran, Hea, Sup, Any
f.snowy-drake-slayers-i.effects: Cold Blooded: 25% chance to proc 800 Ice damage vs Dragon raids; +50% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.snowy-drake-slayers-i.description: Harnessing the skills you developed during your time in the frozen wastes, you send forth your armies to help fell the nearest drake.

f.snowy-drake-slayers-ii.name: Snowy Drake Slayers II
f.snowy-drake-slayers-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: 3-Per, 2-Any, Elf+Cas, Cns+Tan, Orc+Mel
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Hea, Sup, Any
f.snowy-drake-slayers-ii.effects: Colder Blooded: 25% chance to proc 500 Ice damage; +1,000 damage vs Dragon raids; +65% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.snowy-drake-slayers-ii.description:
"Cold bad for many dragons. Not Frigidara. Go stop the others. I wait here for her."
-Aegyr Snowbound

f.swarm-storm-iii.name: Swarm Storm III
f.swarm-storm-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Lea, Con, Hum, Dwa, 2-Any, Gno+Ran+Agi, Orc+Ran, Elf+Per
Troops: 4-Int, 5-Gno, 4-Any, Fae+Hea+Int
f.swarm-storm-iii.effects: Spring Rebirth: 8% chance to proc 10,000 Lightning damage; +10,000 damage vs Insect raids; +1,000 damage vs Insect raids per Renewal Gardiner in the Formation; +75% Formation Special vs Insect raids
f.swarm-storm-iii.description:
"We shall forgo dispersing the swarm, and instead dissipate it with such ferocity that it reconsiders returning next year."
-Tririana Cobblestomp

f.rangers-advance-iii.name: Ranger's Advance III
f.rangers-advance-iii.effects: Ranger's Armament: 12% chance to proc 250 Physical damage
f.rangers-advance-iii.description:
"Your skills have certainly improved in the short time we've known eachother. However, soon you will learn to see what you cannot see."

"What I cannot see? What kind of sense is that?"

"The sense that best describes a Master Ranger, of course."

-Conversations with Yathane Shahara

f.gravewatcher-iii.name: Gravewatcher III
f.gravewatcher-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Ran, Cas, Sup, Str, Int, Per, 3-Any
Troops: 4-Mel, 4-Cas, 8-Sup, 4-Any
f.gravewatcher-iii.effects: Undead Oversight: 15% chance to proc 4500 Dark damage vs Undead raids; +70% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.gravewatcher-iii.description:
"Death is always pointless. That's the point."
-Vittamar

f.gravewatcher-ii.name: Gravewatcher II
f.gravewatcher-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Ran, Cas, Sup, Str, Per, 2-Any
Troops: 3-Mel, 4-Cas, 6-Sup, 2-Any
f.gravewatcher-ii.effects: Undead Sight: 15% chance to proc 1200 Dark damage vs Undead raids; +60% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.gravewatcher-ii.description: You could not imagine patrolling around, staring at lifeless, stone monuments in graveyards on a regular basis. What kind of person would let themself get roped into such a career?

f.troop-tactics-ii.name: Troop Tactics II
f.troop-tactics-ii.description:
"Please take some of the guardians with you to ensure your protection while away. It would be prudent to return in one piece."
-Adroit

f.offensive-stance-ii.name: Offensive Stance II
f.offensive-stance-ii.description: If pure offence isn't getting the job done, oftentimes it's a good indicator that your strategy needs to change. In such cases, going for even more offence seems like a viable plan.

f.glorymuths-grin-i.name: Glorymuth's Grin I
f.glorymuths-grin-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Cas, Per, Cns, 2-Any, HEl+Mel+Per
Troops: 2-Ran, 2-Hea, 2-Any
f.glorymuths-grin-i.effects: Uncanny Gaze: 8% chance to proc 5625 Dark damage
f.glorymuths-grin-i.description: Mirth is well-and-good, but there's something unnatural about Corros' persistently 'pleasant' visage.

f.kepees-awakening-ii.name: Kepees Awakening II
f.kepees-awakening-ii.effects: Awakened Insight: 25% chance to proc 800 Psychic damage; +600 damage vs Flora raids; +50% Formation Special vs Flora raids
f.kepees-awakening-ii.description:
"Which one of you should I be talking to. Ah.. haha... ha... You're so funny. Where's my paint? Want to try one of my mushrooms?"
-Manitaria Leafshade

f.swarm-storm-ii.name: Swarm Storm II
f.swarm-storm-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Lea, Con, Hum, Dwa, Any, Gno+Ran+Agi, Orc+Ran, Elf+Per
Troops: 4-Int, Gno, 3-Any, Fae+Hea+Int
f.swarm-storm-ii.effects: Spring Storms: 8% chance to proc 6,000 Lightning damage; +7,000 damage vs Insect raids; +500 damage vs Insect raids per Renewal Gardiner in the Formation; +65% Formation Special vs Insect raids
f.swarm-storm-ii.description:
"Perhaps a storm of this power has the potential to drive the newly awakened creatures away from this land."
-Tririana Cobblestomp

f.faulty-floriculture-ii.name: Faulty Floriculture II
f.faulty-floriculture-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, Con, 3-Any, *Sp
Troops: 4-Mel, 4-Con, 3-Cns, 3-Any
f.faulty-floriculture-ii.effects: Hedge Pruning: 12% chance to proc 5,000 Fire damage; +3,000 damage vs Flora raids; +400 damage per Shearing Statue in the Formation; +65% Formation Special vs Flora raids
f.faulty-floriculture-ii.description: There can be some confusion when your plants are just as capable of eating you as you are them.

f.troop-tactics-iv.name: Troop Tactics IV
f.troop-tactics-iv.description:
"This small of a showing simply will not do for the performance we have planned... Wait, what do you mean you're not on your way to the show?!"
-Conversations with Nereus

f.enduring-gaze-iii.name: Enduring Gaze III
f.enduring-gaze-iii.description: A series of troops, able to coordinate their vision such that the group never misses a moment is an impressive feat. You have to give credit to their commanders, though you wish they would blink a little more when talking with you...

f.burrowing-brutish-beast-i.name: Burrowing Brutish Beast I
f.burrowing-brutish-beast-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, 2-Str, 2-Con, 2-Agi, 2-Int, Gob, Any
Troops: 4-Sup, 4-Int, 3-Elf, 3-Gob, 6-Any
f.burrowing-brutish-beast-i.effects: Devoured from Below: 8% chance to proc 11,250 Nature damage
f.burrowing-brutish-beast-i.description:
"Wonderful holes to crawl through! All kinds of nutritious droppings left behind! This creature is truly a wonder... or, was truly a wonder..."
-Weeg, giving you a side-glance.

f.swarm-storm-iv.name: Swarm Storm IV
f.swarm-storm-iv.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Lea, Con, Hum, Dwa, 5-Any, Orc+Ran, Elf+Per, *Sp
Troops: 4-Int, 9-Gno, 5-Any, Fae+Hea+Int
f.swarm-storm-iv.effects: Spring's New Rebirth: 8% chance to proc 15,000 Lightning damage; +15,000 damage vs Insect raids; +3,000 damage vs Insect raids per Renewal Gardiner in the Formation; +90% Formation Special vs Insect raids
f.swarm-storm-iv.description:
"It seems our earlier efforts were insufficient to prevent the swarm's return, so with renewed vigour we must redouble our efforts."
-Tririana Cobblestomp

f.rise-of-the-medzeh-ii.name: Rise of the Medzeh II
f.rise-of-the-medzeh-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Lea, 4-Any, HEl+Ran+Lea, Und+Cas+Int
Troops: Str, 2-Per, 2-Und, 2-Gob, 5-Any
f.rise-of-the-medzeh-ii.effects: Medzeh's Duty: 12% chance to proc 4,000 Holy damage; +4,000 damage vs Demon raids; +70% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.rise-of-the-medzeh-ii.description:
"The Order may be smaller with every passing generation, but the skills passed down never wane."
-Apui

f.brawns-and-brains-ii.name: Brawns and Brains II
f.brawns-and-brains-ii.effects: Beefy Brilliance: 4% chance to proc 980 Magic damage
f.brawns-and-brains-ii.description:
"Surely it makes more sense for us to take turns being at the front and attacking from the back, right?"

"Oh, surely,  yes! You are very clever! I'll take this turn in the back, and you can go back up to the front. I will call on you later for your turn."

"See? Doesn't it feel better when we agre- Hey, wait-a-minute...."
-Conversations with Nico Orbesco

f.door-crashers-ii.name: Door Crashers II
f.door-crashers-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, 2-Sup, 4-Any, Gob+Per
Troops: 2-Tan, 3-Con, 2-Int, 3-Per, 4-Any
f.door-crashers-ii.effects: Oh Yeah!: 4% chance to proc 16,000 Acid damage and bypass a Sentinel Raid's damage reduction Ability; +100% Formation Special vs raids with Sentinel
f.door-crashers-ii.description: When going around a challenge is no longer an option, sometimes you have to go straight through it.

f.troop-tactics-i.name: Troop Tactics I
f.troop-tactics-i.description:
"Take care, young master, not to forget to look after yourself, even when surrounded by such powerful allies."
-Geo Fray

f.vyldas-feasting-i.name: Vylda's Feasting I
f.vyldas-feasting-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, Str, Con, Agi, Int, Per, Lea, 4-Any, Gob+Per, *Sp
Troops: 6-Sup, 6-Con, 6-Hum, 6-Any
f.vyldas-feasting-i.effects: Hungering Heme: 16% chance to proc 20,000 Dark damage and give +5% Crit Rate; +3,000 damage per Bloody Supplicant in the Formation
f.vyldas-feasting-i.description:
"Go forth and spill blood in Her name! She will reward those who bring Her the freshest and tastiest!"
-Illiana Bloodletter

f.floor-guardians-i.name: Floor Guardians I
f.floor-guardians-i.effects: +15% Formation Special vs Guild raids; +15% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.floor-guardians-i.description:
"There is a time to bring the servants to bare, master. However, there are also times when you need only bring out the heavy cavalry."
-Geo Fray

f.psyguard-defenders-i.name: Psyguard Defenders I
f.psyguard-defenders-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Sup, Str, Con, 2-Int, Per, 4-Any, Elf+Tan, *Sp
Troops: 2-Ran, 2-Cas, 2-Sup, 6-Int, 2-Lea, 4-Any
f.psyguard-defenders-i.effects: Psychic Shield: 5% chance to proc 50,000 Psychic damage; +5,000 damage per Psyguard Magician or Psyguard Kinetic in the Formation
f.psyguard-defenders-i.description:
"If you are seen protecting your followers, they will pay it back one hundredfold."
-Morah Psyguard

f.build-a-battalion-ii.name: Build-a-Battalion II
f.build-a-battalion-ii.description:
"So, if you’re okay with creating more knights to follow you, why wouldn’t you just make more of yourself to lead them?"

"..."
-Conversations with Avtan

f.rangers-advance-i.name: Ranger's Advance I
f.rangers-advance-i.description:
"Forward, men! We shan't stop until we track down and eliminate these bandits, on my family's honour!"
-Arendyl Greenleaf

f.inhuman-intensity-i.name: Inhuman Intensity I
f.inhuman-intensity-i.effects: Anti-Human Coalition: 20% chance to proc 400 Dark damage; +200 damage vs Human raids; +30% Formation Special vs Human raids
f.inhuman-intensity-i.description: If your varied armies think they can figure out a better way to organize themselves, you're happy giving them leave to try.

f.factions-felicity-i.name: Faction's Felicity I
f.factions-felicity-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Hea, Any, *Sp
Troops: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, Any, 2-*Sp
f.factions-felicity-i.effects: Fortunate Friends: 4% chance to proc 2,500 Physical damage; +2,500 damage vs Guild raids; +35% Formation Special vs Guild raids
f.factions-felicity-i.description:
"Eat, drink and be merry! You can let down your guard around friends, and take a moment to relax before rejoining the battle!"
-Kylli Oakenbrew

f.shiwei-battalion-i.name: Shiwei Battalion I
f.shiwei-battalion-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup
Troops: 6-Mel, 8-Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Cas, 2-Hea, 2-Sup
f.shiwei-battalion-i.effects: Tatar Strike: 12% chance to proc 3500 Physical damage
f.shiwei-battalion-i.description:
"Not only across this nation, but across the continent, men still remember the name of my grandfather, Temujin the Conqueror. He freed his people, and unified a hundred other peoples under his rule, and we shall honour his name as we end this invasion from the Void!"
-Borjigin Kuyuk

f.frigidara-defenders-iii.name: Frigidara Defenders III
f.frigidara-defenders-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 5-Any
Troops: 2-Any, 5-Elf+Ran, 4-Dwa+Tan, 5-Gno+Sup, 5-Gob+Hea, 4-Orc+Mel
f.frigidara-defenders-iii.effects: +10% Crit Rate vs Frigidara; +240% Formation Special vs Frigidara
f.frigidara-defenders-iii.description:
"The Defenders come of own accord. They experienced with the Horde. Rely upon them."
-Aegyr Snowbound

f.fast-and-furious-ii.name: Fast and Furious II
f.fast-and-furious-ii.effects: Sundae Sprinkles: 5% chance to proc 640 Physical damage
f.fast-and-furious-ii.description: You've half a mind to tell off Kurtis for his bloodcurdling screams and seemingly hasty tactics... if only they weren't so darned effective!

f.explosive-experiments-i.name: Explosive Experiments I
f.explosive-experiments-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, 2-Sup, Agi, Int, 3-Any, Hum+Sup+Lea, Und+Sup
Troops: Ran, Cas, 7-Sup, 2-Int, 2-Per, Hum, HEl, 6-Any
f.explosive-experiments-i.effects: Unstable Upperclass: 24% chance to proc 10,000 Acid damage; 10% chance to proc 3,000 Acid damage; +4,000 damage per Viscous Herbalist or Viscous Alchemist in the Formation
f.explosive-experiments-i.description: Viscount Thorne's experiments may seem haphazard, but if nothing else they are undeniably eventful. Sometimes violently so!

f.flight-of-the-faeries-i.name: Flight of the Faeries I
f.flight-of-the-faeries-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Sup, Per, Fae, 2-Any
Troops: 3-Con, 3-Per, 3-Fae, Any
f.flight-of-the-faeries-i.effects: Panicked Pixies: 30% chance to proc 2,000 Magic damage; +1,000 damage per Fae Army Unit in the Formation
f.flight-of-the-faeries-i.description: There are few things more frightening than a horde of terrified fae creatures, each trying to escape in a frenzied fervor.

f.luna-cruzados-iii.name: Luna Cruzados III
f.luna-cruzados-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, Sup, Per, 2-Lea, 7-Any, Dwa+Tan, *Sp
Troops: 3-Cas, 3-Sup, 3-Con, 3-Int, Dwa, Gno, 8-Any
f.luna-cruzados-iii.effects: Moon's Crusader: 4% chance to proc 55,000 Holy damage and protect the Player from Brimstone Aura - Fire and Brimstone Aura - Dark; +40,000 damage vs Demon Raids; +80% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.luna-cruzados-iii.description: Irus is said to send forth His legions in order to be rid of the impure and to prove His love to all those who remain. Now is the time to ride.

f.defensive-stance-i.name: Defensive Stance I
f.defensive-stance-i.description: Regrouping your troops may not lead to the quickest victory, but it may lead to more victories as your armies are preserved.

f.killer-kindness-ii.name: Killer Kindness II
f.killer-kindness-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Ran, Cas, Str, Int, Lea, 2-Any
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Cas, 4-Perc, 2-Any
f.killer-kindness-ii.effects: Crueller but Usual: 5% chance to proc 1000 Holy damage vs Demon raids; +60% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.killer-kindness-ii.description:
"Look, I think I understand the basic principle... And I don't disagree that a kinder, gentler society is probably for the best.... But how is a technical, offensive formation, bent upon exterminating some Devil, considered 'Kind'?"
-Conversations with Glasha Brunbruk

f.rear-offence-ii.name: Rear Offence II
f.rear-offence-ii.description:
"So long as our front lines can draw the fire, the day is won."

"I don't know... the fight has only just begun, and I'm not sure it's decided quite yet..."

"If you are still unconvinced, you can just step back, watch and learn."
-Conversations with Marley

f.wise-leadership-i.name: Wise Leadership I
f.wise-leadership-i.description:
"There is wisdom in leadership, and a good leader is wise."

"But isn't that just another way of saying that wise people should always be the boss?"

"Ah, I see you're catching on!"
-Glaciver Frost

f.snowy-drake-slayers-iv.name: Snowy Drake Slayers IV
f.snowy-drake-slayers-iv.effects: Blood's Run Cold: 25% chance to proc 2,500 Ice damage; +3,000 damage vs Dragon raids; +90% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.snowy-drake-slayers-iv.description: After having exercised your command using what you had learned, you were surprised to see that there remained techniques beyond your knowledge of how best to fight in winter conditions. Now you can set about trying out these newer skills and assessing how they fare.

f.cargo-aboard-i.name: Cargo Aboard I
f.cargo-aboard-i.effects: Cargo Deck: 12% chance to proc 5,000 Physical damage
f.cargo-aboard-i.description: There seems to be a balancing act for many sailors, as they try to balance getting as much cargo onto their ship as they can, while both avoiding slowing their travel too much and sinking the boat, entirely.

f.slithering-sequence-ii.name: Slithering Sequence II
f.slithering-sequence-ii.effects: Pungi's Blessing: 25% chance to proc 720 Psychic damage vs Naga raids; +50% Formation Special vs Naga raids
f.slithering-sequence-ii.description: Well, if you've ever needed subjects to help you train your forces about the movements of Naga fighters, you've certainly struck gold...

f.stone-worshippers-ii.name: Stone Worshippers II
f.stone-worshippers-ii.effects: Tears of Stone: 10% chance to proc 200 Holy damage vs Underground raids; ; +50% Formation Special vs Underground raids
f.stone-worshippers-ii.description:
"Why is it that you can chip away at that stone, or mould it into new shapes, and not consider it blasphemy to Orimneni? Weren't those rocks sculpted with a specific purpose in mind?"

Dondomra does not appear amused by your query.

f.rear-offence-i.name: Rear Offence I
f.rear-offence-i.description:
"Just because I'm in the rear doesn't mean I can't go on the offence."

"Wouldn't it make more sense for you to be in the front lines, then?"

"... How's about you let me sort out where I go, and you go somewhere else, entirely?"
-A conversation with Marley

f.enduring-gaze-i.name: Enduring Gaze I
f.enduring-gaze-i.description: When you suggested keeping a close eye on the enemy, you were hoping for someone to keep you generally apprised of their movements, and not end up nearly-blind by refusing to blink!

f.stone-worshippers-iii.name: Stone Worshippers III
f.stone-worshippers-iii.effects: Weeping Stone: 10% chance to proc 100 Holy damage vs Underground raids; +60% Formation Special vs Underground raids
f.stone-worshippers-iii.description:
"It should be apparent, even to you, that what has been done here has twisted even the stones of this land. We will purge them of this evil, in Orimneni's name."
-Dondomra Grimfeet

f.mohagans-crew-ii.name: Mohagan's Crew II
f.mohagans-crew-ii.effects: Things Remote: 6% chance to proc 1250 Lightning damage vs Aquatic raids; +80% Formation Special vs Aquatic raids
f.mohagans-crew-ii.description:
"For all the inexplicable antics this wretched beast throws at us, I'd still take its company over the courters and fools ashore, for there is no folly of the beast of the earth which is not infinitely outdone by the madness of men."
-Machla

f.vibrant-victors.name: Vibrant Victors
f.vibrant-victors.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, 2-Str, 2-Per, 2-Lea, 2-Any, Elf+Hea+Lea, Mer+Mel+Str
Troops: 2-Sup, 2-Agi, 3-Lea, 2-Cns, 3-Any, 2-Sup+Lea, 2-Orc+Mel, 2-Mer+Agi
f.vibrant-victors.effects: Victory in Vibrance: 30% chance to proc 600 Physical damage
f.vibrant-victors.description:
"What's the point of winning if you can't do it with style?"
Cyran Jokalyn, heartily patting Peleg on the back.

f.jeweled-oculus-i.name: Jeweled Oculus I
f.jeweled-oculus-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Hea, Sup, Per, HEl, Any
Troops: 3-Sup, 2-Int, 2-Elf, 2-Any
f.jeweled-oculus-i.effects: Gleaming Eyes: 15% chance to proc 800 Magic damage; +1,200 damage vs Beast raids; +1,200 damage vs Fae raids; +40% Formation Special vs Beast and/or Fae raids; Prevents damage to Armies from the Stone Gaze Ability
f.jeweled-oculus-i.description:
"Never would have expected such a mythical creature like this to be found in this gorge. Quick, bring me a notepad, I have to document these thoughts!"
-Malon Roris

f.team-encampment-i.name: Team Encampment I
f.team-encampment-i.effects: Team Meating: 2% chance to proc 55,000 Physical damage; +10% Formation Special vs Guild raids
f.team-encampment-i.description:
"Hmph. If you really wanted something 'defensive', you shoulda come to me, first. I've got something I can fix ya' up with..."
-Slygse

f.storm-shapers.name: Storm Shapers
f.storm-shapers.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Mel, 2-Tan, Ran, Hea, 2-Sup, Mer+Cas+Agi, Dwa+Sup+Lea
Troops: Ran, 2-Cas, 2-Hea, 3-Sup, 3-Str, 3-Dwa, 3-Gno, 2-Any
f.storm-shapers.effects: Shaping the Storm: 35% chance to proc 4,000 Lightning damage; 4% chance to proc 20,000 Lightning damage
f.storm-shapers.description:
"We may not bring the storms, but we shape them to our heart's desires."
-Thundreag Stormchest

f.divine-foresight-i.name: Divine Foresight I
f.divine-foresight-i.description: You aren't entirely sure whether the conflicting worships of your allies will cause any problems, but when you see a congregation of particularly religious individuals heading onto the battlefield, you suspect it may be wiser not to ask questions you don't want to hear the answers to.

f.psyguard-counterstrike-i.name: Psyguard Counterstrike I
f.psyguard-counterstrike-i.effects: Psychic Torpedo: 25% chance to proc 14,000 Psychic damage and reduce damage to Armies by 50%
f.psyguard-counterstrike-i.description:
"Once your foes have exhausted themselves against your defences, the opportunity to deliver a powerful counter-attack will present itself."
-Alaion Torris

f.chased-the-storm-i.name: Chased the Storm I
f.chased-the-storm-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Hea, Sup, 2-Any, Orc+Mel+Lea, Cns+Ran
Troops: Tan, 2-Sup, 2-Int, Per, 2-Gno, Any
f.chased-the-storm-i.effects: Shocking Search: 12% chance to proc 1,875 Lightning damage and 1,875 Nature damage
f.chased-the-storm-i.description: Sometimes you chase the storm. Other times, it chases you.

f.firedancers-hand-overs.name: Firedancer's Hand-Overs
f.firedancers-hand-overs.effects: Moves Like Jagar: 15% chance to proc 200 Ice damage; +40% Formation Special vs Jagar the Red; Prevents damage to Armies from the Flamebreath Ability
f.firedancers-hand-overs.description:
"You wake up in the morning and you look at your old spoon, and you say to yourself, 'Well, it's time to get yourself a new spoon.' And you do."
-Unknown

f.organ-grinding-i.name: Organ Grinding I
f.organ-grinding-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Str, Fae
Troops: Cas, Sup, Lea, HEl, 2-Und, 2-Any
f.organ-grinding-i.description:
"The mermaids from the riverbed, whispering as you flow by, are heard by everything under the blue sky above.

The noise of your passing is a song from old times and with the brightest sounds your song leads you ever on."

f.heroic-dusk.name: Heroic Dusk
f.heroic-dusk.effects: Order of the Heroic Dusk: 40% chance to proc 2,000 Physical damage; 8% chance to proc 21,250 Physical damage; +2,500 damage per Heroic Dusk Striker or Heroic Dusk Mage in the Formation
f.heroic-dusk.description: The Order of the Heroic Dusk may have been formed fairly recently, but has already accrued considerable reputation within both the Empire and the Republic. You feel honoured to be joined by them... At least, you did once Alanis finished lecturing you about the Order and the prestige it has earned.

f.toxin-trappers.name: Toxin Trappers
f.toxin-trappers.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Sup, Agi, 3-Any, Ran+Agi+Orc, Sup+Con+Dwa
Troops: Str, Gob, 4-Any, 3-Hea+Int, 2-Tan+Cns
f.toxin-trappers.effects: Fury of the Fanghunters: 12% chance to proc 2,400 Physical damage; +3,600 damage vs raids with Venomous
f.toxin-trappers.description: The Fanghunters are not a well known society, but remain nevertheless dedicated to their mission: To snuff out the infestors and infectors of the world, using any means necessary.

f.kepees-awakening-i.name: Kepees Awakening I
f.kepees-awakening-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: 3-Hea, 2-Per, Elf, Any
Troops: Tan, Sup, 2-Con, 2-Int, 2-Hum, 2-Elf, 2-Any
f.kepees-awakening-i.effects: Awakened Awareness: 25% chance to proc 600 Psychic damage; +400 damage vs Flora raids; +40% Formation Special vs Flora raids
f.kepees-awakening-i.description:
"Remember to thank Amera for Her sunlight, and Irus for the moonlight, and to show your gratitude with dance!"
-Manitaria Leafshade

f.mohagans-crew-i.name: Mohagan's Crew I
f.mohagans-crew-i.effects: Everlasting Itch: 6% chance to proc 750 Lightning damage vs Aquatic raids; +70% Formation Special vs Aquatic raids
f.mohagans-crew-i.description:
"Aie, it's certainly best you know what you're getting yourself into, youngin'. The Mushvelli may look strange in the water, but she'll chase your boat ashore, and then continue the pursuit on land just as readily... It'll surely haunt a woman's dreams, but better to know than not, for ignorance is the parent of fear."
-Machla

f.sepulcher-seekers.name: Sepulcher Seekers
f.sepulcher-seekers.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, 2-Ran, 2-Per, 2-Any, Hum+Tan+Con, Und+Tan+Int
Troops: Tan, Cas, Sup, 2-Dwa, 2-Gob, 2-Orc, 3-Any
f.sepulcher-seekers.effects: Specialty Searchers: 15% chance to proc 4,000 Dark damage; +5,000 damage vs Undead raids; +30% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.sepulcher-seekers.description:
"The most sacred of rites can be uncovered, along with their... rich histories... in the most sequestered catacombs..."

"That must unveil so much cultural importance and value, wouldn't it?"

"... Yes... cultural value..."
-Conversations with Banefre Sadu

f.citywatch-i.name: Citywatch I
f.citywatch-i.description: The trusted Citywatch of Mihr is tasked with keeping the peace in the streets, both through force of arms and armed with words. They are renowned for their skill at this, though it has not proven quite so effective against outside forces seeking to invade the city.

f.fachin-fallback-i.name: Fachin Fallback I
f.fachin-fallback-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Sup, Con, Per, Fae, Any, Hum+Tan+Agi
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Hea, 2-Fae, Any
f.fachin-fallback-i.effects: Fey Forbidder: 16% chance to proc 2,500 Physical damage; +1,500 damage vs Fae raids
f.fachin-fallback-i.description:
"Bein' unable tae resist th' charm o' that hideous thing, yit remaining conscious tae mah actions. Howfur disgraceful."
-Nhuman Dannu

f.blazebrand-pyre-i.name: Blazebrand Pyre I
f.blazebrand-pyre-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, 2-Sup, Agi, Int, Per, Lea, 3-Any, Orc+Tan+Int, Sup+Int
Troops: 2-Tan, 2-Cas, 2-Sup, 2-Int, Gno, 3-Cns, 2-Und, 5-Any
f.blazebrand-pyre-i.effects: Flame Emblem: 14% chance to proc 12,000 Fire damage; 5% chance to proc 10,000 Fire damage; +8,000 damage per Blazebrand Embersprite in the Formation
f.blazebrand-pyre-i.description:
"Not just any fire will do. We require a cleansing blaze, carefully constructed and cultivated to bring forth a righteous change."
-Urzul Shamn

f.faulty-floriculture-i.name: Faulty Floriculture I
f.faulty-floriculture-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, Ran, Cas, Sup, Con, Any
Troops: 2-Mel, 2-Con, 2-Cns, 2-Any
f.faulty-floriculture-i.effects: Hedge Trimming: 12% chance to proc 2,500 Fire damage; +1,500 damage vs Flora raids; +200 damage per Shearing Statue in the Formation; +50% Formation Special vs Flora raids
f.faulty-floriculture-i.description: As good as vegetation can be, it is important to properly care for your plants.

f.troop-tactics-iii.name: Troop Tactics III
f.troop-tactics-iii.description:
"If you aren't gonna put those troops to good use, why not have'm gimme a hand hauling some of today's merchandise to the shop?"
-Slygse

f.stone-worshippers-i.name: Stone Worshippers I
f.stone-worshippers-i.effects: Stones in Heaven: 10% chance to proc 100 Holy damage vs Underground raids; +40% Formation Special vs Underground raids
f.stone-worshippers-i.description:
"Some have said that when you hold the right stone to your ear, you can hear the voice of Orimneni herself."
-A Dwarven Stoneworker

f.fae-foolery-i.name: Fae Foolery I
f.fae-foolery-i.effects: Foolhardy Fairies: 5% chance to proc 1,700 Magic damage
f.fae-foolery-i.description:
"Do you have any desires in your heart that seek to be fulfilled? Tell them to me..."
-Sishara

f.jeweled-oculus-ii.name: Jeweled Oculus II
f.jeweled-oculus-ii.effects: Lustrous Eyes: 15% chance to proc 1,600 Magic damage; +2,400 damage vs Beast raids; +2,400 damage vs Fae raids; +50% Formation Special vs Beast and/or Fae raids; Prevents damage to Armies from the Stone Gaze Ability
f.jeweled-oculus-ii.description:
"What do you care if I keep one of the eyes? Oh, it's not what you think: it will provide its weight in research value. Do you take me for a common looter?"
-Malon Roris

f.frigidara-defenders-i.name: Frigidara Defenders I
f.frigidara-defenders-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup
Troops: 2-Any, 3-Elf+Ran, 2-Dwa+Tan, 3-Gno+Sup, 2-Gob+Hea, 2-Orc+Mel
f.frigidara-defenders-i.effects: +5% Crit Rate vs Frigidara; +160% Formation Special vs Frigidara
f.frigidara-defenders-i.description:
"These Defenders have been recruited from across the lands and trained for one singular purpose: Staving off Frigidara when she next returns."
-Bellas Inahice

f.gentle-gardening-i.name: Gentle Gardening I
f.gentle-gardening-i.effects: A Little Off the Top: 5% chance to proc 300 Physical damage; +40% Formation Special vs Flora raids
f.gentle-gardening-i.description:
"Tending to a garden is a lot like winning a war. There are the innocent flowers you want to protect, not unlike the citizens of a nation. There are invasive weeds threatening to strangle everything around them, akin to an invading horde. There are young seedlings, who require careful nurturing to grow into strong, mature adults. You could do well to take up some lessons in gardening, yourself."

-Agronomo, tending to his gardens.

f.laetries-lightbringers.name: Laetrie's Lightbringers
f.laetries-lightbringers.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, 3-Hum, 4-Any, Tan+Str+Hum, Cas+Lea+Hum
Troops: Cas, Sup, 4-Hum, 3-Any, 2-Cas+Hum, 2-Sup+Hum
f.laetries-lightbringers.effects: Laetrie's Luminescing Light: 10% chance to proc 5,000 Dark damage; 3% chance to proc 40,000 Holy damage; +60,000 damage vs Undead raids
f.laetries-lightbringers.description: The Chandlers of Laetrie may verge on the fanatical, even for this particular church, but there is no denying that they are very effective at what they do. Many towns have been saved only because the Chandlers received the call for assistance.

f.warpriests-of-chaunath-i.name: Warpriests of Chaunath I
f.warpriests-of-chaunath-i.effects: Protect and Guard: 14% chance to proc 5,000 Holy damage
f.warpriests-of-chaunath-i.description:
"Strength does not come in decimating the weak, but in protecting them."
-Warpriest Orghash

f.faulty-floriculture-iii.name: Faulty Floriculture III
f.faulty-floriculture-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, Con, Per, 5-Any, *Sp
Troops: 5-Mel, 5-Con, 5-Cns, 4-Any
f.faulty-floriculture-iii.effects: Hedge Torching: 12% chance to proc 10,000 Fire damage; +6,000 damage vs Flora raids; +800 damage per Shearing Statue in the Formation; +90% Formation Special vs Flora raids
f.faulty-floriculture-iii.description: Once the vegetation becomes this overgrown, pruning it can be a struggle. Ultimately, you'd best cut it back before it cuts you back.

f.blindfolded-band-i.name: Blindfolded Band I
f.blindfolded-band-i.effects: +20% Formation Special vs Beast raids; Prevents damage to Armies from the Stone Gaze Ability
f.blindfolded-band-i.description: It is certainly a counterintuitive notion, handicapping one's self in order to fight a legitimate foe. That being said, when the options involve a blindfold, eye-gouging, or death by a cursed gaze, sometimes the lesser evil prevails.

f.dwarven-company-i.name: Dwarven Company I
f.dwarven-company-i.effects: Minor Miner's Inc.: 5% chance to proc 800 Physical damage
f.dwarven-company-i.description:
"So, overseeing the Honorbound must come with certain... perks, right? I mean, you are necessary for the safety of the Stoneworkers."

"My services to the clan are remunerated appropriately. The Honorbound, however, are here to regain their lost honour, not to make a quick buck."
-Norsic Bittermail

f.organ-grinding-ii.name: Organ Grinding II
f.organ-grinding-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Tan, 2-Str, Fae, 2-Any
Troops: 3-Cas, Sup, 3-Lea, HEl, 3-Und, 3-Any
