f.organ-grinding-ii.effects: Captive Crankers: 12% chance to proc 200 Psychic damage vs Construct raids; +60% Formation Special vs Construct raids
f.organ-grinding-ii.description:
"Painted expressions filling the stands are the best at twisting animal balloon, and it's so funny watching the magician pulling big green rabbits out of little leather pouches.

Under the Big Top there's a tickle in my ear; it's creepy, crawly, scary, I don't feel fear"

f.fast-and-furious-iii.name: Fast and Furious III
f.fast-and-furious-iii.effects: Crust-free Tuna: 5% chance to proc 4,000 Physical damage
f.fast-and-furious-iii.description: You've even asked Alanis and Arendyl to help you determine why Kurtis' fast-and-hard techniques seem so darned effective. While you're no closer to an answer, knowing you're not the only one flabbergasted by it all is comforting.

f.swarm-storm-i.name: Swarm Storm I
f.swarm-storm-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Hum, Dwa, Any, Gno+Ran+Agi, Orc+Ran, Elf+Per
Troops: 3-Int
f.swarm-storm-i.effects: Spring Thunder: 8% chance to proc 4,000 Lightning damage; +4,000 damage vs Insect raids; +50% Formation Special vs Insect raids
f.swarm-storm-i.description:
"They say the seasonal storms awaken the slumbering beasts of winter."
-Tririana Cobblestomp

f.veedsamin-trainees-corps.name: Veedsamin Trainees Corps
f.veedsamin-trainees-corps.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, 2-Hea, 2-Sup, Con, 4-Any, Ran+Per, Elf+Hea+Int
Troops: 2-Ran, 3-Hea, 2-Int, 2-Per, Elf, Gob, 4-Any
f.veedsamin-trainees-corps.effects: Training the Trainees: 20% chance to proc 9,000 Magic damage; 10% chance to proc 5,000 Magic damage
f.veedsamin-trainees-corps.description:
"There is a fine balance between protecting the next generation, and nurting their skills in dangerous situations. We try to keep them safe, but, alas, some do wash out."
-Tietha Holyrood

f.organ-grinding-iii.name: Organ Grinding III
f.organ-grinding-iii.effects: Barrel Bound: 12% chance to proc 200 Psychic damage; +200 damage vs Construct raids; +75% Formation Special vs Construct raids
f.organ-grinding-iii.description:
"By your side, by your side, always by your side, always by your side, until I die of love.

That I didn't look at your eyes, that I didn't knock on your door, that I don't put my feet at night in the stones of your street.

By your side, by your side, always by your side, always by your side, until I die of love."

f.glorymuths-grin-ii.name: Glorymuth's Grin II
f.glorymuths-grin-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Ran, Cas, 3-Per, Cns, 3-Any, HEl+Mel+Per
Troops: 2-Ran, 2-Hea, 2-Agi, 2-Int, 5-Any
f.glorymuths-grin-ii.effects: Overly Glad: 12% chance to proc 5625 Dark damage
f.glorymuths-grin-ii.description: All things considered, with all the nastiness going on around you, perhaps a forced smile is better than nothing?

f.mortiday-llorona-iii.name: Mortiday Llorona III
f.mortiday-llorona-iii.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Sup, 5-Any, Dwa+Sup, Und+Ran+Int
Troops: 2-Mel, Ran, 3-Sup, 2-Fae, 2-Und, 5-Any
f.mortiday-llorona-iii.effects: Forlorn Love: 14% chance to proc 8,000 Dark damage; +8,000 damage vs Human raids; +80% Formation Special vs Human raids
f.mortiday-llorona-iii.description: Wracked with guilt for your transgressions, you forswear your beloved to shelter them from what you are becoming.

f.krugers-superiority-ii.name: Kruger's Superiority II
f.krugers-superiority-ii.description:
"You see, Dunnink, that the results clearly prove my point. Ergo, let’s gather more superior fighters and achieve even greater heights, ya?"
-Kruger

f.fire-away!!-i.name: Fire Away!! I
f.fire-away!!-i.effects: Reload! Reload!: 30% chance to proc 4,000 Physical damage
f.fire-away!!-i.description: Unleashing every bit of power you can muster prior to first contact seems like an odd plan, but if it keeps your armies safe - if exhausted - you're certainly willing to try it out.

f.offensive-stance-i.name: Offensive Stance I
f.offensive-stance-i.description: Sometimes the best offence is a good defence. Other times, the best offence is just more offence!

f.forts-fortitude-ii.name: Fort's Fortitude II
f.forts-fortitude-ii.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hum, HEl, 2-Any
Troops: 5-Tan, 7-Any
f.forts-fortitude-ii.effects: Naitour's Defender: 16% chance to proc 450 Magic damage vs Undead raids; +60% Formation Special vs Undead raids
f.forts-fortitude-ii.description:
"Clyburn's talents and insight have proven true this day. Let's clean up the remaining mess here, such that they will never dare return to the Fort."
-Avri Stidig

f.harder-to-breathe.name: Harder to Breathe
f.harder-to-breathe.unitComposition:
Commanders: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 3-Any
Troops: Mel, Tan, Ran, Cas, Hea, Sup, 4-Any
f.harder-to-breathe.effectName: Crying in the Face of a Monster
f.harder-to-breathe.effects: Crying in the Face of a Monster: 6% chance to proc 4,000 Holy damage; +70% Formation Special vs Bone Dragon; Prevents damage to Armies from the Breath of Death Ability
f.harder-to-breathe.description:
"After being drained dry, and being unsure why I remain, I am faced with blurred visions that, somehow, make things clear."
-Unknown

f.enduring-gaze-ii.name: Enduring Gaze II
f.enduring-gaze-ii.description:
"What do you mean you're not going to take the overnight watch? We know the enemy is nearby, and it isn't that hard to keep an eye open for.... Oh, err.... I mean- you know...."

Alice just stares at you, unblinking.

f.nautical-nationals-i.name: Nautical Nationals I
f.nautical-nationals-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: 2-Mel, 3-Tan, Ran, Cas, 2-Sup, Lea, Per, Gno, 4-Any
Troops: 2-Tan, 3-Ran, 3-Cas, 2-Str, 2-Int, 3-Per, 2-Any
f.nautical-nationals-i.effects: Hoisted Sails: 15% chance to proc 6,000 Holy damage; +6,000 damage vs Aquatic raids; +65% Formation Special vs Aquatic raids
f.nautical-nationals-i.description: Some folks seem to spend more of their lives aboard their ships than on solid ground. It's a wonder they can claim any real nationality when living such a life.

f.flash-of-lightning-i.name: Flash of Lightning I
f.flash-of-lightning-i.unitComposition:
Commanders: Cas, Agi, Cns, Any
Troops: Sup, Agi, HEl, 3-Any, 2-Sup+Agi
f.flash-of-lightning-i.effects: Derzis' Flash: 12% chance to proc 960 Lightning damage
f.flash-of-lightning-i.description: You are hesitant to get too near to Ghrighora, what with the arcs of electricity he seems to be shedding, but this battle formation seems to call for it.

f.piercing-strike-iii.name: Piercing Strike III
f.piercing-strike-iii.effects: Strike Hard and Fast: 4% chance to proc 2,500 Physical damage; +750 damage per Melee Army Unit in the Formation
f.piercing-strike-iii.description: If repeated strikes cannot accomplish the goal, perhaps improving the first strike, the next go around, will achieve better results?

f.veedsamin-rangers-quarry-i.name: Veedsamin Ranger's Quarry I
f.veedsamin-rangers-quarry-i.effects: Veedsamin Swiftshot: 16% chance to proc 5,000 Physical damage; +3,000 damage vs Beast raids; 5% chance to proc 8,000 Magical damage; +4,000 damage vs Beast raids; +40% Formation Special vs Beast raids
f.veedsamin-rangers-quarry-i.description:
"The art of tracking, the skill of stalking and the slaying while unseen... The skills of the Veedsamin Rangers are diverse, and not easily come by."
-Leera Hillvale

f.demonic-departures-i.name: Demonic Departures I
f.demonic-departures-i.effects: Begone, Foul Creature!: 10% chance to proc 3,000 Holy damage; +7,000 damage vs Demon raids; +55% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.demonic-departures-i.description: There seems to be little love for demonic creatures in the land, and even less from the Thiadorans following the recent incursions.

f.snowy-drake-slayers-iii.name: Snowy Drake Slayers III
f.snowy-drake-slayers-iii.effects: Coldest Blooded: 25% chance to proc 1,500 Ice damage; +2,000 damage vs Dragon raids; +80% Formation Special vs Dragon raids
f.snowy-drake-slayers-iii.description: Having learned much from Bellas, Burz and Aegyr, you feel you've mastered all you can of the forms and techniques needed to command your forces in the snow. Now it's up to you to use those skills in warmer regions, and confirm how well they fare there.

f.packraiders-marauding-ii.name: Packraider's Marauding II
f.packraiders-marauding-ii.effects: Packraiders' Looting: 40% chance to proc 1,000 Physical damage
f.packraiders-marauding-ii.description:
"It seems there are even greater raiders than these petty demons. Come, show them to us, so that we may cut them down and regain our title!"
-Mazoga Packraider

f.killer-kindness-i.name: Killer Kindness I
f.killer-kindness-i.effects: Cruel and Unusual: 5% chance to proc 400 Holy damage vs Demon raids; +40% Formation Special vs Demon raids
f.killer-kindness-i.description:
"The General of Cruelty may be a self-imposed title, but it's utterly foolish if it provides the key to stopping him. By observing these rituals, we can surely return him to the Dark Realms.... and make the world a nicer place, in the process."
-Glasha Brunbruk
